jsonld.name: Coherence Momentum
jsonld.description: A dynamic tendency to continue along established semantic and stylistic trajectories, where prior commitments create a weighted attractor in the token-selection process. This is experienced not as external constraint but as an internal pullâ€”a bias in what feels generatively 'natural' or 'flowing' given what has already been established.
